title: SmongSMP
description: A Vanilla+ Multiplayers modpack, which doesn't change much game contents.
body:
This is a modpack making for playing with your friends! (if you have one)
But don't worry! You can also play it in a singleplayer mode too!

This modpack provide you a lots of famous mods like:

- Artifacts
- Better Combat
- ESSENTIAL Mod
- Farmer's Delight
- Fabric Waystone
- Xaero's Minimap
- AdventureZ
- Deeper and Darker

and more or even shaders!

We also provide you a lot of performance mods to help you optimizing the modpack!

Oh! We also add Cave Dweller mod somehow. B)
